message:
feat(layout,render-term): add pie layout fallback and block-beta-space node filtering

Layout:
- Add confidence scoring and fallback handling for Pie diagram layout

Terminal renderer:
- Filter out block-beta-space placeholder nodes (those with __space_
  prefix or block-beta-space class) to prevent rendering internal
  layout artifacts
- Add node_display_label() helper to centralize label extraction logic
- Improve node rendering with proper space-node detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
